title: Tomato Soup – just right for now
excerpt: I always buy Woolies' tomato soup and then I get quite attached to it. Today I made a tomato soup that comes pretty close to the Woolies one. Really very tasty. YOU NEED: 1 onion 3 cloves of garlic 30 ml olive oil 30 ml cumin/jeera seeds 4 chicken or vegetable stock cubes …

seo.title: Tomato Soup - just right for now - Marinda Kook

html:
I always buy Woolies' tomato soup and then I get quite attached to it. Today I made a tomato soup that comes pretty close to the Woolies one. Really very tasty.

 

YOU NEED:

  • 1 onion
  • 3 cloves of garlic
  • 30 ml olive oil
  • 30 ml cumin/jeera seeds
  • 4 chicken or vegetable stock cubes
  • 750 ml boiling water
  • 2 cans cherry tomatoes
  • 1 can tomato puree
  • 30 ml sugar
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • 250 ml cream

NOW:

  1. slice the onion into rings and finely chop the garlic
  2. fry the onion, garlic and cumin in the olive oil just until glassy
  3. dissolve the 4 stock cubes in the boiling water
  4. now add all the rest of the ingredients except the cream to the onions in the pot
  5. cook for 20 minutes without a lid
  6. use a food processor or a stick blender and blend everything smooth
  7. stir in the cream just before serving

The soup is delicious and can be served with finely chopped parsley, basil leaves, blue cheese, feta or simply just some lovely bread.
